_comment: Verified 2026-07-01. Uses Ant Design (antd). Input is textarea.message-input-textarea. Send button is button.send-button (renders only after text is typed). Stop button button.stop-button appears during generation (thinking + web search) and disappears on completion — primary completion indicator. Response text is in div.response-message-content.phase-answer (appears only in answer phase, excludes thinking/searching text). div.chat-response-message is fallback (includes 'Thinking completed' prefix). During streaming, send button gets disabled. responseMonitor limits completion detection to answer phase only.

input: textarea[placeholder="How can I help you today?"]
